## NotebookLmDriver.addTextSourceAndAwaitTitle() method

Adds a text source and waits for NotebookLM to assign it a generated title. Returns the auto-generated title (the stable handle for `removeSource`<!-- -->).

**Signature:**

```typescript
addTextSourceAndAwaitTitle(nb: Notebook, content: string, timeoutMs?: number): Promise<string>;
```
